objective: Simulate whether Phase25 authority supports FundedNext Stellar Lite 10k, with special focus on 0.75% risk.

rules_stellar_lite_10k.news_trading: Challenge allowed; FundedNext Account allowed but subject to News Profit Split Rule.
rules_stellar_lite_10k.weekend_holding: Challenge allowed; FundedNext Account not allowed.
rules_stellar_lite_10k.commission_spread_limitations: No exact commission/swap adjustment in R ledger.
assumptions: Daily loss is modeled as a 4% equity draw from server-day starting balance, using MAE as intraday equity proxy.
Maximum loss is modeled as static account equity floor at -8% of initial balance.
Phase 2 starts after Phase 1 passes and resets challenge balance/risk counters.
Commission and swap are not adjusted because Phase25 ledger is R-based.
User-reported 10k price 47.99 USD is treated as checkout-dependent metadata, not a verified purchase quote.
unknowns: Exact Stellar Lite commission/spread/swap conditions by platform and instrument.
Exact checkout price and account availability for the user's jurisdiction/date.
Operational interpretation of News Profit Split Rule in live funded payout cycle.

rule_notes: Official help page states Stellar Lite Phase 1 target is 8%, Phase 2 target is 4%, and there is no time limit.
For 10k, Phase 1 target is 800 USD and Phase 2 target is 400 USD.

sources.source_url_label: FundedNext Daily Loss vs Maximum Loss
rule_notes: Official help page states Stellar Lite daily loss is 4% and maximum loss is 8%.
Server reset uses GMT+2/GMT+3 seasonal server time; simulation approximates this with Europe/Athens.
Official help page states 5 separate trading days and 5 trades per phase.
FundedNext phase has no profit target and no minimum trading day requirement; first cycle is 21 days, then 14 days.
Weekend holding is allowed on Challenge accounts but not on FundedNext Accounts.
News trading is allowed, but FundedNext Account profits during the high-impact news window are subject to the News Profit Split Rule.

assumptions: Daily loss is modeled as a 4% equity draw from server-day starting balance, using MAE as intraday equity proxy.
Maximum loss is modeled as static account equity floor at -8% of initial balance.
Phase 2 starts after Phase 1 passes and resets challenge balance/risk counters.
Commission and swap are not adjusted because Phase25 ledger is R-based.
User-reported 10k price 47.99 USD is treated as checkout-dependent metadata, not a verified purchase quote.

daily_loss_4pct_audit.pure_sl_streak_4_implication: At 0.75% four pure SL equals 3.0%, below 4% daily loss but close after MAE; at 1.0% four SL equals the full 4% limit.

news_weekend_rule_audit.phase25_intraday_policy_claim: Phase25 is intended as an intraday/daytime line, but the physical historical ledger shows weekend-crossing exits.

comparison_vs_ftmo.good_first_small_evaluation: PAPER_OR_FREE_TRIAL_FIRST; real purchase not recommended from price alone.

risk_recommendation.company_product: FundedNext Stellar Lite 10k paper/free-trial first; no real purchase until weekend-funded rule is audited.
risk_recommendation.platform_suggested: MT5 is supported by product metadata, but Phase32B did not touch MT5.
risk_recommendation.max_not_exceed: 0.60% for paper challenge simulation; 0.50% for funded survival; 0.75% is not base if any daily breach remains.

next_step: Run a Phase32 paper/free-trial decision checkpoint for Stellar Lite at 0.50%, not real purchase.
